name: umbraculum-monorepo
description: AI-orchestrated open platform with composable vertical modules. Brewery seeded; MRP / WMS / CRM / CRP / automation next.

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @umbraculum/i18n && npm run build -w @brewery/i18n-react && npm run build -w @umbraculum/navigation && npm run build -w @brewery/contracts && npm run build -w @brewery/module-sdk && npm run build -w @umbraculum/automation-contracts && npm run build -w @brewery/api-client && npm run build -w @umbraculum/ui && npm run build -w @brewery/beerjson && npm run build -w @brewery/recipes-ui && npm run build -w @umbraculum/media
scripts.seed:e2e: docker compose exec -T api npm run seed:e2e
